configurations.name: mestre-launcher
configurations.note: Porta 7777 obrigatoria — hardcoded no HTML frontend (BASE = http://127.0.0.1:7777), em assets/api.js e no mcp-server/index.js. Mudar a porta quebraria toda a comunicacao. Requer Admin (UAC). Gerenciado via tarefa agendada 'MestreDoPC_Admin_Launcher' — nao usar preview_start.

configurations.name: mestre-mcp
configurations.note: Servidor MCP stdio (sem porta HTTP). Gerenciado pelo Claude Code via 'claude mcp add'. Nao iniciar manualmente.
